---

**Summary of layers crossed:**

| Layer | What happens |
|---|---|
| **React UI** | `LoginPage` owns all input state; delegates auth to store selectors |
| **Zustand store** | `useAuthStore` (useAuthStore.ts) holds `login`, `loginWithSetupToken`, `setMultiStoreEnabled`; persist middleware auto-serializes state on every `set()` |
| **Context bridge** | `electron/preload.cjs` exposes `window.electronAPI.*` â€” each method is a thin `ipcRenderer.invoke(channel, ...args)` wrapper |
| **IPC / Main process** | `electron/main.cjs` handles `auth:validateGithub`, `auth:encryptToken`, `auth:saveAuthStore`, `auth:loadAuthStore`, `sync:getFile` via `ipcMain.handle` |
| **Data layer** | `safeStorage.encryptString/decryptString` (OS DPAPI on Windows) + `fs.writeFileSync/readFileSync` for local encrypted files; `https.request` to `api.github.com` for token validation and role detection |
